title: Listening - Part 1
description: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best.
instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

extracts.context: You hear two colleagues discussing a project deadline.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Have you had a chance to look at the revised project plan? || Woman: I have, and I think we might run into some issues with timings. || Man: That's exactly what I'm worried about [1]—meeting the deadline.[/1] We're tight on time already. || Woman: True, but I think if we focus on prioritizing the tasks, we might get through this. || Man: Perhaps. I'm concerned about the budget constraints as well. || Woman: Well, the budget is fixed, so we'll have to be creative with how we allocate resources. || Man: You're right. We might also consider updating the client to set realistic expectations. || Woman: Good idea. I’ll draft a communication plan after our meeting. [2]We need to stay proactive with these challenges.[/2]

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you had a chance to look at the revised project plan?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I have, and I think we might run into some issues with timings.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's exactly what I'm worried about—meeting the deadline. We're tight on time already.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: True, but I think if we focus on prioritizing the tasks, we might get through this.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Perhaps. I'm concerned about the budget constraints as well.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, the budget is fixed, so we'll have to be creative with how we allocate resources.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: You're right. We might also consider updating the client to set realistic expectations.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good idea. I’ll draft a communication plan after our meeting. We need to stay proactive with these challenges.

questions.question: What is the man's main concern about the project?
questions.explanation: B is supported by [1]meeting the deadline[/1] because he emphasizes the tight schedule.

questions.question: The woman implies that she...

options.A: plans to manage the project's timeline proactively.
options.C: thinks the current timeline is perfect.

questions.explanation: A is correct as she mentions drafting a communication plan to manage challenges, showing proactive planning.

extracts.context: You hear a conversation between friends planning a weekend trip.
extracts.audio_script: Man: I'm really looking forward to the trip this weekend. Have we finalized the itinerary yet? || Woman: Not yet. [3]I think we should decide on the main activities first.[/3] Any thoughts? || Man: Well, hiking was at the top of the list last time we talked. || Woman: Yes, but let's consider the weather. If it rains, we might want to have a backup plan. || Man: True, I didn't think of that. Maybe we should plan an indoor activity as well. || Woman: Great. How about visiting the new art exhibit downtown? || Man: [4]That sounds perfect.[/4] It's good to have options. Plus, we can always decide based on how we feel on the day. || Woman: Agreed. Flexibility is key. I'll handle the bookings for whatever we choose.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I'm really looking forward to the trip this weekend. Have we finalized the itinerary yet?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not yet. I think we should decide on the main activities first. Any thoughts?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Well, hiking was at the top of the list last time we talked.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, but let's consider the weather. If it rains, we might want to have a backup plan.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: True, I didn't think of that. Maybe we should plan an indoor activity as well.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Great. How about visiting the new art exhibit downtown?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds perfect. It's good to have options. Plus, we can always decide based on how we feel on the day.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Agreed. Flexibility is key. I'll handle the bookings for whatever we choose.

questions.question: What does the woman suggest they do first?
questions.explanation: C is correct as she says [3]decide on the main activities first[/3].

questions.question: How does the man feel about visiting the art exhibit?
questions.explanation: C is supported by [4]that sounds perfect[/4], indicating enthusiasm.

extracts.context: You hear a tutor and a student discussing a research paper.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: I read through your draft, and it's coming along well. Have you thought about expanding the conclusion? || Man: I found the conclusion challenging to write. [5]I want to ensure it ties all the points together well.[/5] || Woman: You’re on the right track. Perhaps you could revisit your main arguments to reinforce them. || Man: That's a good idea. I'll review the highlighted sections you noted. || Woman: Also, remember to integrate more recent research findings to support your claims. || Man: I'll search for updates in the latest journals. It's quite a process, isn't it? || Woman: [6]Research is indeed ever-evolving,[/6] but keeping up to date strengthens your arguments significantly. || Man: Thank you for the feedback. I'll incorporate these changes before the final submission.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I read through your draft, and it's coming along well. Have you thought about expanding the conclusion?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I found the conclusion challenging to write. I want to ensure it ties all the points together well.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: You’re on the right track. Perhaps you could revisit your main arguments to reinforce them.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's a good idea. I'll review the highlighted sections you noted.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Also, remember to integrate more recent research findings to support your claims.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I'll search for updates in the latest journals. It's quite a process, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Research is indeed ever-evolving, but keeping up to date strengthens your arguments significantly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thank you for the feedback. I'll incorporate these changes before the final submission.

questions.question: What is the man's main challenge regarding the paper?
questions.explanation: B is supported by [5]want to ensure it ties all the points together well[/5], indicating his concern about cohesion.

questions.question: What is the tutor's attitude towards research?

options.A: It's unnecessary for a strong paper.

questions.explanation: C is indicated by [6]Research is indeed ever-evolving[/6], highlighting the importance of staying updated.
